HomePage.aboutTitle: Building solutions that transform the future.
HomePage.aboutP1: We believe that by organizing the creative process and working in partnership with clients, we can multiply the results of your project.
HomePage.aboutP2: Agility's goal is to always deliver more than expected. We will be a light partnership that brings you closer to the success of your project!
HomePage.servicesTitle: We find the {highlight} solution for your project
HomePage.servicesDescription: Discover how we can boost your business with technology, design, and strategy.
HomePage.service1_description: Websites that truly deliver results for your project. Modern design focused on performance and conversion.
HomePage.service2_description: Custom apps and games brought to life. From concept to app store publication.
HomePage.service3_description: Take advantage of market expansion with online sales. Platforms optimized to convert visitors into customers.
HomePage.service4_description: Total focus on optimizing your project results. Specialized consulting to scale your business.
HomePage.portfolioTitle: Projects that made a {highlight} in our history
HomePage.portfolioDescription: Discover some of the many projects we've developed for our clients.
HomePage.portfolio_dra_description: Elegant and welcoming website for a psychiatrist, focused on appointment scheduling and mental health digital presence.
HomePage.portfolio_mr_description: Modern website built with WordPress for Monteiro & Rolim Law Firm, with responsive design and performance focus.
HomePage.portfolio_easy_description: App design focused on practical and beautiful MVP, with intuitive UI/UX and positive client feedback.
HomePage.portfolio_academia_description: Institutional website to modernize the academy's digital presence, with member area and event management.
HomePage.portfolio_agillock_description: Modern and dynamic landing page built with Next.js, focused on online presence and lead capture.
HomePage.portfolio_agility_description: Complete brand identity modernization — logo, typography, and color palette to reposition the brand.
HomePage.portfolio_dynotest_description: Website for brand positioning with WhatsApp integration for direct contact and increased conversions.
HomePage.ctaTitle: {highlight1} minds and {highlight2} processes generate more results
HomePage.ctaDescription: For any digital project, having an experienced team makes all the difference.
HomePage.faq1_q: How long does it take to develop a project?
HomePage.faq1_a: The timeline depends on project complexity. Landing pages can be ready in 1-2 weeks, while more complex apps can take 2 to 4 months. We always set a clear schedule before starting.
HomePage.faq2_q: Do you work with companies of any size?
HomePage.faq2_a: Yes! We serve everyone from startups and individual entrepreneurs to mid-sized companies. We adapt our solutions to meet each client's needs and budget.
HomePage.faq3_q: How does the work process function?
HomePage.faq3_a: We start with a conversation to understand your needs. Then we create a detailed scope, develop the project in sprints with partial deliveries, and finalize with tests and adjustments. You follow everything closely.
HomePage.faq4_q: Do you offer support after delivery?
HomePage.faq4_a: Yes, we offer post-delivery support to ensure everything works perfectly. We also provide ongoing maintenance plans for updates and improvements.
HomePage.finalCtaDescription: Let's talk about how we can help take your business to the next level.

AboutPage.title: Meet
AboutPage.subtitle: We are more than a company. We are professionals passionate about solutions. We believe in a future where technology integrates seamlessly into people's lives.
AboutPage.testimonialQuote: Our digital presence was transformed with a website that exceeded expectations. The result boosted our business, and the experience with the team was exceptional!
AboutPage.processTitle: How do we transform ideas into
AboutPage.processP1: At Agility, every project starts with a clear vision, brought to life by a team passionate about innovation. We use a proven method that exceeds expectations.
AboutPage.processP2: Our transparent approach allows clients to follow the development, building trust and ensuring customization.
AboutPage.step1_description: We understand your needs, goals, and expectations for the project.
AboutPage.step2_description: Market research, competitor analysis, and scope definition.
AboutPage.step3_description: We create a detailed proposal with timeline, scope, and investment.
AboutPage.step4_description: Development in sprints with partial deliveries and continuous testing.
AboutPage.step5_description: Final adjustments, deployment, and ongoing support to ensure success.
AboutPage.ctaTitle: With Agility, every project is a mission to
AboutPage.ctaDescription: We are by your side from conception to completion, opening new possibilities for the future.
